description_long: This object is a pair of side-by-side double-barrel shotguns, each featuring a classic wooden full stock and a break-action mechanism. The barrels are metallic, cylindrical, and arranged parallel to each other, with a dark, slightly worn finish. The stocks are made of polished wood with a visible grain, and the buttplates appear to be reinforced with a darker, possibly rubberized material. The trigger guards are rounded and enclose double triggers, with a simple, utilitarian design. The break-action hinge is clearly visible, with one shotgun shown in an open position, exposing the breech for loading. The overall appearance suggests a traditional, robust design suitable for hunting or sport shooting in an urban or rural context.
description: A pair of classic side-by-side double-barrel shotguns with wooden stocks and break-action mechanisms, one shown open for loading. The barrels are metallic and parallel, with rounded trigger guards and visible double triggers.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the buttplates of both shotguns and the twin barrels aligned side-by-side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full wooden stocks, break-action hinge, and one shotgun open at the breech.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the parallel double barrels and the overall length of the shotguns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stocks, break-action, and the open position of one shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
